summary: Worked within the Image Processing Team of the Electro-Optical Systems (MEOS) department on an AI-based automation pipeline for object detection in infrared imagery.
highlights: Evaluated and integrated open-source object detection models such as OWL-V2 and Florence-2.
Benchmarked pre-trained vision models using custom datasets, measuring detection accuracy, class generalizability, and inference speed.
Implemented prototype-level integrations that enabled near real-time detection and reduced manual data labeling workload.

summary: Contributed to ERP implementation and customization processes within the consultancy department of caniasERP.
highlights: Received training on PRJ, SYS, and DEV modules and on the proprietary TROIA development language.
Supported a company vehicle management application by creating database tables, classes, dialogs, and transactions.
Learned practical ERP consulting, system configuration, and client-oriented customization.

summary: Assisted the Network and Security Team with day-to-day operations, troubleshooting, documentation, and cybersecurity-related observation.
highlights: Supported basic system configuration, troubleshooting, and documentation.
Learned cybersecurity fundamentals through log monitoring, user access control, and simple vulnerability scans.
Observed system audits and security assessments to learn enterprise infrastructure best practices.
